summary: The implementation successfully addresses all four requirements. The backend populates music library and podcasts with complete metadata structures including new fields (duration, album placeholder via TrackNoAlbum, description, host). The frontend displays tracks in TrackList with functional play controls and podcasts in a grid layout with expandable episode lists that integrate with the audio player. Migration logic handles data structure upgrades.

hallucinated_features.description: Introduced 'TrackNoAlbum' type instead of using existing 'Track' structure with album field
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest constraints specify 'Use the existing Track and Podcast data structures defined in backend/main.mo'. The diff shows a new TrackNoAlbum type was created, which appears to be a modification of the Track structure rather than using the existing one as-is.

hallucinated_features.description: Added migration module for data structure upgrades
hallucinated_features.reason: Migration.mo introduces schema migration logic for OldTrack/OldPodcast to new structures. While useful, this was not requested in the BuildRequest and may constitute additional work beyond the specified scope.

hallucinated_features.description: Added duration formatting helper functions in frontend components
hallucinated_features.reason: formatDuration utility functions appear in EpisodeList.tsx and TrackList.tsx. While supporting the display requirements, these specific formatting utilities were not explicitly requested.
